buildCommand: uv pip install -e . && uv pip install uvicorn

PULLBACK_DISCOVERY_PROVIDERS.description: Comma-separated list of discovery providers (default: arxiv_api). Examples: openalex,zbmath_open,arxiv_api,semantic_scholar

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Required for OpenAI-based query planning and embeddings. Get from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

E2B_API_KEY.description: Required for fetching arXiv LaTeX sources. Get from https://e2b.dev

OPENALEX_API_KEY.description: Optional: for higher rate limits on OpenAlex discovery

OPENALEX_MAILTO.description: Optional: your email for OpenAlex polite-pool access

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: Optional: for LLM-based discovery via OpenRouter

PULLBACK_LIBRARIAN_MODEL.description: LLM model for query planning. Examples: openai/gpt-4o-mini, anthropic/claude-3-haiku. Set to 'test' to disable LLM calls.

PULLBACK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Timeout for discovery and metadata fetching in seconds

PULLBACK_RERANKER.description: Reranking strategy: token-overlap (default), bge, colbert, openrouter_model

PULLBACK_LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO (default), WARNING, ERROR
